subtitle.zh: JavaScript 测试，由 Rspack 加速

slogan.en: Jest-compatible, ready out of the box.
slogan.zh: 兼容 Jest API，开箱即用。

reuseBuildConfigDesc.en: Reuse Rsbuild or Rspack aliases, transforms, and plugins instead of maintaining a separate test setup.
reuseBuildConfigDesc.zh: 复用 Rsbuild 或 Rspack 的 alias、转换与插件，无需重复维护测试配置。

productionAccurateTestingDesc.en: Run tests through Rspack's bundling model so transforms and module resolution stay closer to production.
productionAccurateTestingDesc.zh: 通过 Rspack 的 bundle 模型运行测试，让代码转换和模块解析更贴近生产环境。

blazingFastDesc.en: Rspack-powered compilation keeps test startup and reruns fast.
blazingFastDesc.zh: 由 Rspack 驱动的编译让测试启动与重新运行保持快速。

realBrowserTestingDesc.en: Run tests in Chromium, Firefox, or WebKit through Playwright when jsdom isn't enough.
realBrowserTestingDesc.zh: 基于 Playwright 在 Chromium、Firefox、WebKit 中运行测试，覆盖 jsdom 难以验证的场景。

modernByDefaultDesc.en: Test TypeScript, ESM, CJS, and CSS Modules without configuring a separate transform pipeline.
modernByDefaultDesc.zh: 无需单独配置转换链路，即可测试 TypeScript、ESM、CJS 和 CSS Modules。

testingReadyDesc.en: Use familiar assertions, snapshots, and mocks, with coverage and lifecycle hooks built in.
testingReadyDesc.zh: 使用熟悉的断言、快照与 Mock API，并内置覆盖率和生命周期钩子。
